'''BigScoop Robo-Harvester''' was a harvester [[Droid/Legends|droid]] model manufactured by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. Standing 25 meters above ground, this [[Agrirobot/Legends|agrirobot]] came with all tools necessary to perform a variety of harvesting work, from fertilizing to collecting grain.

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
